description_long: This object is a set of three tall, rectangular storage lockers joined side by side, each with a distinct colored border—two with red and one with green. The lockers feature vented upper panels for airflow, and each door is equipped with a small, rectangular handle and a built-in locking mechanism. The rightmost locker door is shown partially open, revealing a dark, spacious interior with at least one internal shelf. The exterior finish is smooth and matte, predominantly dark gray or black, with the colored borders providing visual distinction. The lockers stand on small feet, slightly elevating them from the ground. This design is typical for secure storage in public or semi-public urban environments such as schools, gyms, or transit stations.
description: A trio of tall, dark storage lockers with colored borders, vented doors, and built-in handles, designed for secure personal storage in public spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three locker doors, colored borders, vent slits, and one door partially open revealing the interior.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth and solid side panel of the lockers, with the open door edge visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, unadorned backs of the lockers with no visible features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the solid side panel and the open door extending outward.
